'''vovachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:swanless|swanless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swanless|swanless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vovachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovachithi|vovachithi]] || [[word:vovachiji|vovachiji]] || [[word:vovachishi|vovachishi]] || [[word:vovachiki|vovachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovachuthuthu|vovachuthuthu]] || [[word:vovachujuju|vovachujuju]] || [[word:vovachushushu|vovachushushu]] || [[word:vovachukuku|vovachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovachuthu|vovachuthu]] || [[word:vovachuju|vovachuju]] || [[word:vovachushu|vovachushu]] || [[word:vovachuku|vovachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovachufthuf|vovachufthuf]] || [[word:vovachufjuf|vovachufjuf]] || [[word:vovachufshuf|vovachufshuf]] || [[word:vovachufkuf|vovachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovachethe|vovachethe]] || [[word:vovacheje|vovacheje]] || [[word:vovacheshe|vovacheshe]] || [[word:vovacheke|vovacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovachothotho|vovachothotho]] || [[word:vovachojojo|vovachojojo]] || [[word:vovachoshosho|vovachoshosho]] || [[word:vovachokoko|vovachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovachotho|vovachotho]] || [[word:vovachojo|vovachojo]] || [[word:vovachosho|vovachosho]] || [[word:vovachoko|vovachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovachofthof|vovachofthof]] || [[word:vovachofjof|vovachofjof]] || [[word:vovachofshof|vovachofshof]] || [[word:vovachofkof|vovachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfthĂŻf|vovachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfjĂŻf|vovachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfshĂŻf|vovachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfkĂŻf|vovachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|vovachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|vovachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|vovachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|vovachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfthĂŻf|vovachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfjĂŻf|vovachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfshĂŻf|vovachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfkĂŻf|vovachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfthĂŻf|vovachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfjĂŻf|vovachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfshĂŻf|vovachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vovachĂŻfkĂŻf|vovachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vovachĂŠthĂŠ|vovachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vovachĂŠjĂŠ|vovachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vovachĂŠshĂŠ|vovachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vovachĂŠkĂŠ|vovachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vovachathatha|vovachathatha]] || [[word:vovachajaja|vovachajaja]] || [[word:vovachashasha|vovachashasha]] || [[word:vovachakaka|vovachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vovachatha|vovachatha]] || [[word:vovachaja|vovachaja]] || [[word:vovachasha|vovachasha]] || [[word:vovachaka|vovachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vovachafthaf|vovachafthaf]] || [[word:vovachafjaf|vovachafjaf]] || [[word:vovachafshaf|vovachafshaf]] || [[word:vovachafkaf|vovachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vovachasha|vovachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vovachshĂ«sha|vovachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vovachrosha|vovachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vovachmusha|vovachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vovachyasha|vovachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govovachnkshĂ«sha|govovachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govovachnkrosha|govovachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govovachnkmusha|govovachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govovachnkyasha|govovachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vovavachasha|vovavachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vovavachshĂ«sha|vovavachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vovavachrosha|vovavachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vovavachmusha|vovavachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vovavachyasha|vovavachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govovavachnkshĂ«sha|govovavachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govovavachnkrosha|govovavachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govovavachnkmusha|govovavachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govovavachnkyasha|govovavachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vevĂŠchasha|vevĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vevĂŠchshĂ«sha|vevĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vevĂŠchrosha|vevĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vevĂŠchmusha|vevĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vevĂŠchyasha|vevĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govevĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|govevĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govevĂŠchnkrosha|govevĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govevĂŠchnkmusha|govevĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govevĂŠchnkyasha|govevĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vovfachasha|vovfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vovfachshĂ«sha|vovfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vovfachrosha|vovfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vovfachmusha|vovfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vovfachyasha|vovfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govovfachnkshĂ«sha|govovfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govovfachnkrosha|govovfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govovfachnkmusha|govovfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govovfachnkyasha|govovfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
